name: Black Bean and Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 can chopped jalapeno peppers or mild chili peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Crock-Pot, combine the black beans, potatoes, ham, broth, onions, peppers, garlic, cumin, oregano, thyme, and cloves.
2. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours or on High for 4 to 5 hours.
3. Serve garnished with sour cream and chopped tomatoes if desired.
4. Serve 6 to 8 people.
